lightspeed-mcp.description: Red Hat Lightspeed MCP server for CVE data and remediation playbook generation (accessible only through remediation agent and skills)

aap-mcp-job-management.description: Ansible Automation Platform (AAP) job management MCP server for managing job templates, job executions, and workflows

aap-mcp-inventory-management.description: Ansible Automation Platform (AAP) inventory management MCP server for managing inventories, hosts, and groups
